data.title: Bugatti Chiron Super Sport v Pur Sport DRAG RACE_transcript

paragraphs.context: bugatti chiron super sport v pur sport drag race _ transcript what will win in a drag race between a bugatti chiron super sport or a bugatti chiron persport? well, i ' m going to find out by racing them over the standing quarter mile. i ' m matt watson and you ' re watching car wow. the bugatti chiron super sport has an 8 l quadturbo w16 with 1600 horsepower, 1, 600 new m of torque, allwheel drive, a seven - speed dual clutch automatic with launch control. it weighs in at 1, 995 kgs and this one cost from around5 million pounds. the bugatti shiron purport also has an 8 liter quad turbo w160. though this one has 1500 horsepower, 1, 600 newton meters of torque while it ' s also got the same all - wheel drive system and 7 - speed dual clutch automatic gearbox. it does have slightly shorter gear ratios than the sup sport. it ' s also ever so slightly lighter at 1, 945 kilos. terms of the price, very similar to the super sport, £5 million including options. i just want to say a huge thank you to supercars matchless hyper club and ryan cybex for setting this race up and alain city municipality for lending us the tillow suhan dragstrip to race on. this is a special moment because there ' s a lot of debate about which of these two cars will be quickest over the stunning quarter mile. we know this is quickest top speed cuz it ' s got the record, but that has lower gearing. i don ' t know. let ' s find out from it driver what they think is going to happen. hey sam, you in your happy place? i ' ve been in worse places. so, you ' ve got the bugatti that is designed for track driving, more involving drive. it ' s about corners, but while you have 100 less horsepower than me, you have lower gearing, less weight. what do you think ' s going to happen? i think it ' s written on the tin, isn ' t it? i ' m going to beat you off the line. it ' ll probably beat you to the quarter, and when we have the rolling, it ' ll be anyone ' s game. do you know what? i don ' t think it ' s going to be
